grok-imagine.prompt: Couple mirror selfie in hotel bathroom, white towels, blonde woman holding phone, bearded man brushing beard with comb, warm bathroom lighting, natural realistic look

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A couple takes a mirror selfie in a modern hotel bathroom, both wearing white bath towels. On the left stands a slim woman in her mid-twenties with a short blonde bob, holding a dark blue smartphone to capture the reflection. She wears a silver cross necklace and has a relaxed, slightly posed expression. On the right stands an athletic, muscular man in his late twenties with a shaved head and full dark beard, wearing a gold chain necklace. He casually brushes his beard with a wooden comb. The large rectangular wall-mounted mirror reflects beige fabric shower curtains and a light stone bathroom counter behind them. Warm overhead bathroom lighting creates soft, evenly diffused illumination with natural specular highlights on their skin. The image has authentic iPhone photography quality with visible skin pores and natural imperfections. No over-smoothing. No plastic skin. Realistic towel fibers and folds visible.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Couple taking mirror selfie in modern hotel bathroom wearing white bath towels, woman left side short blonde bob holding dark blue phone, athletic man right side shaved head full beard gold chain brushing beard with wooden comb, large wall mirror, beige shower curtains, warm overhead bathroom lighting, iPhone photography aesthetic with natural skin texture and visible pores, intimate casual moment, not overly retouched or airbrushed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A couple captures an intimate mirror selfie moment in a modern hotel bathroom. The woman on the left has a short blonde bob and holds a dark blue smartphone, wearing a white bath towel and silver cross necklace. The athletic man on the right has a shaved head and full dark beard, wearing a white towel around his waist and a gold chain, brushing his beard with a wooden comb. Warm overhead bathroom lighting illuminates the scene with natural skin texture visible. Beige shower curtains and light stone counter in the background. Authentic iPhone photography quality.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Add steam in the background from a recent shower while keeping the couple, their poses, and the warm bathroom lighting the same. Preserve the natural skin texture and towel details.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Two subjects with detailed individual descriptions, accessories, actions
4_negative_hygiene: extensive list preventing AI artifacts and over-processing
6_lighting_storytelling: 'warm bathroom lighting' = intimate morning routine mood
7_multi_subject_coordination: two subjects with individual actions and styling
